commands.review_summary:
Adds a one-time gateway startup warning when host approvals appear to reduce requested global exec security, shares the comparison with exec-policy reporting, adds focused tests, and updates troubleshooting remediation.

PR surface: Source +73, Tests +171, Docs 0. Total +244 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a high-confidence source and test path where `host=auto` plus available sandbox ignores local approvals, while the proposed warning’s changed guard still treats those approvals as effective.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair can align the warning with existing sandbox-aware runtime host resolution without requiring a product decision.
